ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ontologies" (
  "ontology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ontology */,
  "ontology_name" TEXT /* Name of the ontology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ontology */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source of the ontology */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the ontology */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ontology */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ontology */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the ontology */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the ontology maintainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ontology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "ontology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ontology the term belongs to */,
  "term_uri" TEXT /* URI of the term */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label or name of the term */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the term */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the term */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the term */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the term */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* JSON array of synonyms for the term */,
  "related_terms" TEXT /* JSON array of related terms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terms_ontology_id FOREIGN KEY ("ontology_id") REFERENCES ontologies ("ontology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alignments" (
  "alignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alignment */,
  "source_term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source term in the alignment */,
  "target_term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target term in the alignment */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the alignment */,
  "alignment_type" TEXT /* Type of alignment (e.g., exact, broad, narrow) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the alignment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alignment */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last reviewed the alignment */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the alignment was last reviewed */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignments_source_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignments_target_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "alignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alignment being voted on */,
  "voter_type" TEXT /* Type of voter (e.g., family, system) */,
  "voter_name" TEXT /* Name of the voter (e.g., LogMap, FCAMap) */,
  "voter_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes from the voter */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the vote */,
  "vote_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the vote */,
  "voter_version" TEXT /* Version of the voter tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_alignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("alignment_id") REFERENCES alignments ("alignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_votes" (
  "user_vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user vote */,
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vote being cast */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user casting the vote */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the user vote */,
  "vote_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the user vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_votes_vote_id FOREIGN KEY ("vote_id") REFERENCES votes ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alignment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change in alignment history */,
  "alignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alignment being tracked */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the change */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the change was reviewed */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignment_history_alignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("alignment_id") REFERENCES alignments ("alignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignment_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignment_history_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alignment_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "alignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alignment being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment has been edited */,
  "edited_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was last edited */,
  "edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last edited the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignment_comments_edited_by FOREIGN KEY ("edited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignment_comments_alignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("alignment_id") REFERENCES alignments ("alignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignment_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignment_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES alignment_comments ("comment_id")
)
